targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE rate_date = (SELECT MAX(rate_date) FROM global_exchange_rates)
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='USD' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='EUR' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='GBP' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT currency_code, rate, rate_date FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE rate_date = (SELECT MAX(rate_date) FROM global_exchange_rates) ORDER BY rate DESC
SELECT currency_code, rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE rate_date = (SELECT MAX(rate_date) FROM global_exchange_rates) ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT updated_at as time, currency_code, buying_rate FROM bot_exchange_rates
SELECT updated_at as time, currency_code, selling_rate FROM bot_exchange_rates
SELECT currency_code, currency_name, buying_rate, selling_rate, mid_rate FROM bot_exchange_rates ORDER BY currency_code
